this is a set! to get the rest, here:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?keyword=roaring&category=1&creatorname=avatarverse&creatortype=group&salestypefilter=1

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?keyword=deltarune+undertale&category=1&creatorname=avatarverse&creatortype=group&salestypefilter=1 avatarverse bundles all custombundle fantasy metal
